steps.title: Combine the repeated group
steps.content: Both terms contain the same group, $(t+3)$. Combine the coefficients first: $$5(t+3)-7(t+3)=(5-7)(t+3)=-2(t+3).$$

steps.title: Solve the simplified equation
steps.content: Now solve $$-2(t+3)=38.$$ Divide by $-2$ to get $t+3=-19$, then subtract $3$: $$t=-22.$$
